rules.title: Economic foundation
rules.description: Document the economic mechanism clearly enough to explain it briefly.

source_posts.author: TL87739
source_posts.note: Signal purification is explained as a concrete market-relative template rather than an opaque formula.

source_posts.author: LR93609
source_posts.note: The author stresses alpha quality as something that should survive markets rather than cosmetic tuning.

rules.title: Template generalizability
rules.description: Prefer structures that can be described as reusable templates or data-transformation patterns, not one-off curve fits.
reasons: Need at least one supporting field: template_notes, stability_notes, cross_universe_notes, cross_region_notes

source_posts.author: TL87739
source_posts.note: The shared alpha is explicitly framed as a template that can be iterated across analysts and data fields.

source_posts.author: JJ47083
source_posts.note: The post highlights that poor first-order templates create high correlation and weak quality.

rules.title: Implementation simplicity
rules.description: Prefer simple implementations without unnecessary moving parts, especially when unusual windows or controls are piled onto the signal.

source_posts.author: XX42289
source_posts.note: The operator survey shows a compact core used by many higher-stage consultants.

source_posts.author: LR93609
source_posts.note: The PPAC world-first note reports operator average mostly between 1 and 3.

rules.title: Diversification and correlation discipline
rules.description: Explain portfolio fit and avoid candidates whose self or prod correlation is already too close to the existing pool.
reasons: Need at least one supporting field: diversification_notes, portfolio_fit_notes, value_factor_notes

source_posts.author: XX42289
source_posts.note: The author warns against concentrating on one dataset and uses low self-correlation as a selection rule.

source_posts.author: LR93609
source_posts.note: The author directly ties low self and prod correlation to more stable combine and value-factor behavior.

rules.title: Anti-overfitting evidence
rules.description: Show evidence that the alpha was not tuned only for one narrow path.
reasons: Need at least one supporting field: stability_notes, cross_universe_notes, cross_region_notes, test_period_notes

source_posts.author: TL87739
source_posts.note: The post frames the signal as something that should generalize across multiple analyst and data-field substitutions.

source_posts.author: JJ47083
source_posts.note: The author repeatedly rechecks regions, universes, and selection strictness before submission.

rules.title: Coverage and turnover awareness
rules.description: Describe coverage handling, turnover control, and liquidity or universe composition before submission.
reasons: Need at least one supporting field: coverage_notes, turnover_notes, liquidity_notes, capacity_notes, cross_universe_notes

source_posts.author: JJ47083
source_posts.note: The SAC sharing explicitly filters by universe composition and turnover buckets before ranking selected alphas.

source_posts.author: ZV96737
source_posts.note: The Master reflection focuses on refining country-specific alpha construction and backtesting.

rules.title: Quality over quantity
rules.description: Explain why this alpha deserves a submission slot now instead of being added only to increase count.
reasons: Need at least one supporting field: submission_priority_notes, rationale, value_factor_notes

source_posts.author: XX42289
source_posts.note: The author explicitly says low-quality submissions cannot be withdrawn, so quality should dominate count.

source_posts.author: XX42289
source_posts.note: Stage progress is framed through count, pyramid, and combined metrics rather than raw daily churn.

rules.title: Value factor alignment
rules.description: Explain how the alpha helps longer-term contribution after submission through diversification, lower problematic correlation, or stronger regular-alpha quality.
reasons: Need at least one supporting field: value_factor_notes, diversification_notes, capacity_notes, portfolio_fit_notes

source_posts.author: XX42289
source_posts.note: Value factor is described as improving only after enough good regulars are accumulated.

source_posts.author: LR93609
source_posts.note: The author gives concrete regular-vs-SA advice for combine and value-factor improvement.
